confidence_rationale: Video is purely instructional/educational content (titled 'Ligation of the Uterine Artery - O'Leary Technique') with slide overlays, narration cues, and preparation demonstration of surgical anatomy. Not an actual FLS task performance. Content shows preparation of training model and uterine anatomy education, not execution of the FLS endoloop task on the official trainer box. Scoring does not apply.
cannot_determine: Completion time — no timed performance captured
Loop placement accuracy — anatomy prep only, not task execution
Knot security or advancement — no loop deployment or cinching shown
All penalty calculations — instructional content lacks task-specific performance metrics

demonstrated_techniques: Uterine artery anatomical identification and palpation
Uterine massage and tissue manipulation for surgical access
Proper training model handling and tissue orientation
O'Leary technique context (ligation approach for hemorrhage control)
verbal_cues: Procedure title: 'Ligation of the Uterine Artery - O'Leary Technique'
Educational framing: preparation and model setup
common_errors_addressed: Proper identification of uterine artery before ligation
Appropriate tissue handling to avoid tissue damage during preparation

notes: This video is an educational/instructional resource showing anatomical preparation and surgical approach for the O'Leary technique in a clinical context. It is not a trainee performance on the FLS endoloop task and therefore does not receive a performance score. Content is suitable for pre-task instruction but does not demonstrate the specific FLS ligating loop trainer competencies (loop deployment, pusher break, knot advancement, tail cut, mark alignment).
